A

addE(V, V, Double, E) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Adds edge with specific value to the graph.
addV(V) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Adds a vertex with the specific value to the graph.
addVerts(V[]) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Adds new vertices with specific values to the graph.

C

containsE(E) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Checks if the graph contains the specific edge.
containsV(V) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Checks if the graph contains the specific vertex.

E

ECnt() - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Returns count of edge in the graph.

G

getEdgesByVerts(V, V) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Returns list of edges which starts with vFrom and ends with vTo vertices.
getEdgeW(E) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Returns weight of edge with the specific value.
getEFrom(E) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Returns vertex where edge with the specific value begins.
getETo(E) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Returns vertex where edge with the specific value ends.
Graph<V,​E> - Class in ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3
Represents a weighted oriented graph data type with vertices and edges.
Graph() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
 

R

removeE(E) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Removes edge with the specific value from the graph.
removeV(V) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Removes edge with the specific value from the graph.
ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3 - package ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3
 

S

setEdgeW(E, Double) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Changes weight of the specific edge.
setEInceds(E, V, V) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Changes incident vertices of the specific edge.
setEVal(E, E) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Changes value of the specific edge.
setVVal(V, V) - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Changes value of the specific vertex of the graph.

V

VCnt() - Method in class ru.nsu.fit.melnikov.oop.task_1_2_3.Graph
Returns count of vertex in the graph.
